'''Puln''' was a male [[Near-Human]] who worked for [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] [[Green]].

In actuality, Puln working for others within the Black Sun organization. He spied on Green's operations for Vigo [[Sprax]], but really worked for Prince [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]], providing information on Sprax to the leader of the Black Sun.
